# Feature Request

## Description

Please provide a clear description of what you want to be added.

## Motivation

Why do you think this feature is important? What problem does it solve?

## Implementation Idea

Do you have any ideas on how this could be implemented?

## Examples

Show examples of how the feature would be used.

```bash
stellar-scout path/to/contract.wasm --new-flag
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Feature is implemented
- [ ] Tests are added
- [ ] Documentation is updated

## Related Issues

Links to related issues or discussions.
